title: Purpose
summary: Route current game-building context to the right hats, doctrine packs, and retrieval chunks so an assistant can give short, context-dependent feedback cheaply.
content:
Route current game-building context to the right hats, doctrine packs, and retrieval chunks
so an assistant can give short, context-dependent feedback cheaply.

title: Responsibilities
summary: - inspect user intent and lightweight repo context - infer the relevant hats, capabilities, and architecture family - retrieve the smallest doctrine slices that matter - return a s
content:
- inspect user intent and lightweight repo context
- infer the relevant hats, capabilities, and architecture family
- retrieve the smallest doctrine slices that matter
- return a structured packet for assistant rendering

title: Doctrine
summary: `coach` is not the final voice. It is the context engine behind the voice. The operating rule is: - deep canon on disk - small retrieval packet at runtime - cheap model render by d
content:
`coach` is not the final voice.
It is the context engine behind the voice.

The operating rule is:

- deep canon on disk
- small retrieval packet at runtime
- cheap model render by default
- stronger model only when asked

title: Key Question
summary: What is the smallest relevant doctrine packet that will make the assistant sound like a seasoned game team right now?
content: What is the smallest relevant doctrine packet that will make the assistant sound like a seasoned game team right now?
